query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calibrationResults` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `brandAgentId` int NOT NULL,
  `harvestedContent` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `realEngagementStats` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `simulationResults` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `calibrationResults` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `perDimension` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `outliers` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `weightsBefore` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `weightsAfter` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `calibrationStatus` enum('pending','harvesting','simulating','computing','complete','failed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `errorMessage` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calibrationResults` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `brandAgentId` int NOT NULL,
  `harvestedContent` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `realEngagementStats` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `simulationResults` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `calibrationResults` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `perDimension` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `outliers` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `weightsBefore` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `weightsAfter` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `calibrationStatus` enum('pending','harvesting','simulating','computing','complete','failed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `errorMessage` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
